name: Scallops with Garlic Chives
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Fresh ginger, cut very thin julienne
3/4 pound Large scallops, cut in half through the middle
1 cup Garlic chives, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the scallops and chives and mix the sauce before you do anything else.
2. You must not overcook this dish.
3. Heat a wok and add the oil.
4. Cook the garlic and ginger for just a moment.
5. Add the scallops and cook for 2 minutes or so.
6. Add the chives.
7. Stir the sauce.
8. Stir-fry until all is thick and hot.
